applicability_notes: Single-op mapping torch.std -> ttnn.std. In SDXL guidance-rescale call sites, two independent ttnn.std calls (on noise_pred_text_orig and noise_pred) feed a div; they have distinct inputs so they are NOT a horizontal_merge candidate, but the downstream std/std -> div -> mul sequence is a fusion-chain opportunity at graph level.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.std(input_tensor, dim={DIM}, keepdim={KEEPDIM}); constraints: {'dim_none_behavior': 'reduces over all dimensions; with keepdim=True all dims must be passed explicitly to torch', 'input_layout': 'ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT and TILE_LAYOUT both observed in tests', 'dtype': 'bfloat16 observed in tests', 'multi_dim_reduction': 'dim may be a list/tuple of dims, e.g. [1, 2, 3] for per-batch reduction on 4D activations'}

placement_observations.size_descriptor: 4D activation [B, C, H, W] (diffusion noise_pred), reduced over dims [1,2,3] with keepdim=True
placement_observations.source: model call site: SD/SDXL guidance rescale loop (memory_config not explicitly specified, default inherited from producer)
model call site: std_text/std_cfg consumed immediately by ttnn.div
